Title: Calendar Save Fails with 400 Error
description: While configuring a calendar the system does not allow saving and returns status code: 400

description: On Prod platform the forecast has generated successfully but on UI it is not visible

Title: Forecast Stuck in Progress for Trigger Date
description: The forecast with trigger date as 09-10-2025 isn't generated yet and the status remains Forecast in Progress

Title: SNOP Stuck in Progress and DFUs Not Loading
description: SNOP status stuck at Forecast in Progress and DFUs not loading

Title: Forecast Download Fails from Grid
description: When attempting to download the forecast from the grid the system displays a toaster message Download Failed Please Try Again

Title: Route Re-Sync Reflects Unmaintained Routes
description: Route Re Sync button has bug Routes are reflecting even when it is not maintained in Route Master

Title: Add Customer Name/Code Sorting on Multi Planning
description: On Multi Planning page Client needs sorting option for Customer Name/Code

Title: Complete Loading Fails in TMS
description: Getting error while performing complete loading in TMS

description: While uploading the Personnel Master file in EDM a popup message Network Error is displayed and the upload fails

Title: Personnel Demand Hierarchy Sequence Incorrect
description: demand hierarchy in Personnel stored in wrong sequence when more than 9 hierarchies defined

Title: Downloaded EDM File Contains Duplicate Records
description: File downloaded from EDM is having duplicate records. While no duplicate records were uploaded in EDM

Title: Network Master Download Missing Mandatory Columns
description: When downloading the Network Master all mandatory columns are missing. In the EDM UI columns like Start Node End Node SKU Code Mode of Transport and others are not included in the downloaded file

Title: Budget Upload Shows Error Without Error File
description: The user uploaded the budget template but the status shows an error. However the skipped records count is displayed as 0 and the error file for the Budget entity is also not available for download

Title: Transaction Logs Missing Data for PIM Filter
description: UAT Transaction Logs Not Showing Data for PIM Entity Filter

Title: Mapping Master Shows N/A for Quantity UOM
description: While downloading the Mapping Master the Quantity UOM column shows N/A

Title: Uploaded By Field Shows Incorrect Username
description: When the user uploads the master data the uploader's username should automatically appear in the Uploaded By field of the transaction log. Currently the correct username is not being displayed

Title: Abnormal Forecast Spike in Last Two Horizons
description: Abnormal spike in forecast values for the last two horizons SNOP- S&OP January 2026

Title: SNOP Forecast Status Remains In Progress
description: The forecast status is showing as In Progress even though the SNOP was successfully created on 19th
